en: Well, I think since I last was on Radio 1, I got to meet Beyonce a couple of times, which
the first time I really held it together, I was like, thanks for having me to the show,
B, you know, rah, rah, rah.
The thing is, I was in her dressing room, and there was only a little curtain separating
us while she was having her makeup done, and I started going, I don't think I can do this,
I don't think I can do this.
And she would have heard it all.
And then she popped out, so I put on a brave face, but the second time, I went out on a
balcony and got on my hands and knees and cried.
